name: Lemon Yogurt Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Plain Nonfat Yogurt or Low-Fat Lemon-Flavored Yogurt
2 cups Quick Oats or Old-Fashioned Rolled Oats (uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the margarine and granulated sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the yogurt, egg whites, lemon peel, and vanilla; mix until well blended.
3. Combine the oats, flour, baking powder, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the margarine mixture; mix well.
5. Cover the dough and refrigerate for 1 to 3 hours.
6. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Lightly coat a cookie sheet with nonstick cooking spray or oil lightly.
8. With lightly floured hands, shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
9. Place the balls on the prepared cookie sheet.
10. Using the bottom of a glass dipped in granulated sugar, press the dough into 1/8-inch-thick circles.
11. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned.
12. Let cool for 2 minutes on the cookie sheet; then remove to a wire rack.
13. Sift powdered sugar over warm cookies.
14. Let cool completely before storing tightly covered.
Yield: About 4 dozen cookies.
